name: My South Park au
description:
So

I have an au a South Park au and I wanna talk about :))

So basically Eric Cartman gets kicked out his friend group (the main 4) for having narcissistic personality disorder and after that, instead of trying to get better he forms a team of ‘elites’ aka main four haters:

Gary Harrison(stans hater)

Mark Costwolds (Kyle’s #2 hater Cartmans the biggest Kyle hater obviously)

Tammy/Tommy Warner anyways them and kenny had a bad breakup in freshman year and tammy hated him after)

The 4 are trying to plot revenge (They’ll likely never get it)

But on the way they kinda feel like friends

Anyways here are all the groups mainly

The main 4 2.0

Kyle Broflovksi, Stan Marsh, Kenny McCormick and Wendyl testaburger

Eric’s Elites

Eric Cartman, Mark Cotswolds, Gary Harrison, Tommy/ Tammy Warner

Anyways what do you guys think should I make bots on it?
creator: 2dswifelowkey
